en_title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day Star Tom Holland Says He's Working to Bring Miles Morales Into the MCU
cn_title: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》汤姆·霍兰德：正努力让迈尔斯加入MCU
subtitle: 这次，轮到我当导师
opus_summary: 汤姆·霍兰德称正努力让迈尔斯·莫拉莱斯加入MCU，希望向下一代蜘蛛侠传递自己曾受过的引导。《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》7月31日上映，迈尔斯会否出现仍未知。

paragraphs.en: Tom Holland will soon return to the Marvel Cinematic Universe (MCU) for Spider-Man: Brand New Day , but he's already "working towards" a future where Miles Morales and his Peter Parker can swing side by side.
paragraphs.cn: 汤姆·霍兰德即将回归漫威电影宇宙（MCU），出演《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》，但他已经在「努力争取」让迈尔斯·莫拉莱斯与他的彼得·帕克并肩荡秋千的未来。

paragraphs.en: The Spider-Man actor opened up about his "aspirations" for a post-Brand New Day world during an interview with Hobby Consolas . Although nothing is set in stone, when asked about how his wall-crawler may mentor another Spider-Man in the future, he said he's putting in the work to bring Miles Morales into the fold.
paragraphs.cn: 这位蜘蛛侠演员在接受《Hobby Consolas》采访时，畅谈了他在《崭新之日》之后的「愿景」。尽管一切尚未确定，当被问及他的蜘蛛侠未来可能如何指导另一位蜘蛛侠时，他表示自己正努力将迈尔斯·莫拉莱斯纳入其中。

paragraphs.en: "I think at this point in time, we're being really open-minded about what the future looks like," Holland said. "I know that I have aspirations to bring Miles Morales into the universe, however that works out. You know, we've got a lot of work to do to bring that to life."
paragraphs.cn: 霍兰德说：「我认为此刻，我们对未来的走向持非常开放的态度。我知道自己渴望让迈尔斯·莫拉莱斯进入这个宇宙，不管以何种方式实现。你知道，要把它变为现实，我们还有很多工作要做。」

paragraphs.en: Miles Morales is a character fans have hoped to see swinging through the streets of an MCU New York City since Spider-Man: Homecoming first premiered in 2017. That film, Holland's first standalone project as Peter Parker, even featured at least one major reference to the Marvel hero with a cameo appearance from his uncle, Aaron Davis (Donald Glover).
paragraphs.cn: 自从2017年《蜘蛛侠：英雄归来》首映以来，粉丝们就一直希望看到迈尔斯·莫拉莱斯在MCU版纽约市的街头荡秋千。那部电影是霍兰德作为彼得·帕克的首部个人作品，其中甚至通过迈尔斯的叔叔Aaron Davis（唐纳德·格洛弗饰）的客串，埋下了至少一个重要伏笔。

paragraphs.en: The character, also known as the Prowler, has close ties with Miles Morales in projects like the Marvel's Spider-Man video games and the Into and Across the Spider-Verse movies. Although Miles Morales has yet to show up in Holland's neighborhood, Homecoming's version of Uncle Aaron has at least referenced having a nephew somewhere in the MCU.
paragraphs.cn: 这个角色，也就是潜行者，在《漫威蜘蛛侠》游戏和《蜘蛛侠：平行宇宙》《蜘蛛侠：纵横宇宙》电影中与迈尔斯·莫拉莱斯关系密切。尽管迈尔斯·莫拉莱斯尚未出现在霍兰德的街区，但《英雄归来》版的Aaron叔叔至少提到过自己在MCU里有个侄子。

paragraphs.en: Back in 2017, Marvel Studios' Kevin Feige played coy when it came to any potential future appearance for a second Spider-Man . Although Holland stops short of outright confirming that he will appear in an MCU movie after Brand New Day, it at least something he's working toward.
paragraphs.cn: 早在2017年，漫威影业的凯文·费奇就对第二位蜘蛛侠未来可能登场一事含糊其辞。尽管霍兰德尚未直接确认迈尔斯会在《崭新之日》之后的某部MCU电影中现身，但这至少是他努力的方向。

paragraphs.en: "I feel incredibly grateful for the way I was introduced into this world, and that I was shepherded by [Robert Downey Jr.], and I would love to return that favor to the next generation of people that get the luxury of making these movies," he added. "So that is definitely something I'm really working towards."
paragraphs.cn: 他补充道：「我对自己被引入这个世界的方式，以及由（小罗伯特·唐尼）引领着，感到无比感激。我很想把这份恩情回馈给那些有幸参与制作这些电影的下一代人。所以这绝对是我真切努力的方向。」

paragraphs.en: Holland seems to be homing in on Miles Morales, specifically, after previously teasing his interest in an MCU version of the character late last month . When speaking about the future of his Spider-Man at the time, he said he would "love to be a part of setting up" the next chapter.
paragraphs.cn: 霍兰德上月底曾透露过他对MCU版迈尔斯的兴趣，如今似乎正特别聚焦于迈尔斯·莫拉莱斯。当时谈及他的蜘蛛侠未来时，他说自己「很乐意参与铺垫」下一篇章。

paragraphs.en: Spider-Man: Brand New Day swings into theaters July 31, 2026. While we wait to see if it features any more Miles Morales breadcrumbs, you can see what he had to say about the new MCU film's mystery villain . Check out a first look at its popcorn buckets here .
paragraphs.cn: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》将于2026年7月31日登陆院线。我们仍在等待片中出现更多迈尔斯·莫拉莱斯的线索。

pending_dict.reason: 知名漫威角色，中文社区普遍使用此译名，但未在词库中

translated_terms.Into and Across the Spider-Verse: 《蜘蛛侠：平行宇宙》《蜘蛛侠：纵横宇宙》
